rules.name: Hardcoded API Key
rules.description: Hardcoded API key detected in source code
rules.fix: Store API keys in environment variables or secure key management systems

rules.name: Hardcoded Password
rules.description: Hardcoded password detected in source code
rules.fix: Never hardcode passwords. Use environment variables or secure vaults

rules.name: Hardcoded Secret Token
rules.description: Hardcoded secret token detected
rules.fix: Store secrets in environment variables or secret management systems

rules.name: SQL Injection Risk
rules.description: Potential SQL injection vulnerability detected
rules.fix: Use parameterized queries or prepared statements instead of string concatenation

rules.name: SQL Injection - String Formatting
rules.description: SQL query using string formatting (injection risk)
rules.fix: Use parameterized queries with placeholders

rules.name: XSS - innerHTML Usage
rules.description: Direct innerHTML assignment can lead to XSS
rules.fix: Use textContent or sanitize HTML input before assignment

rules.name: XSS - dangerouslySetInnerHTML
rules.description: React dangerouslySetInnerHTML can lead to XSS
rules.fix: Sanitize HTML content or use safe React rendering

rules.name: Unsafe eval() Usage
rules.description: eval() can execute arbitrary code
rules.fix: Avoid eval(). Use JSON.parse() for JSON or safer alternatives

rules.name: Unsafe exec() Usage (Python)
rules.description: exec() can execute arbitrary Python code
rules.fix: Avoid exec(). Use safer alternatives or validate input strictly

rules.name: Command Injection Risk
rules.description: Potential command injection vulnerability
rules.fix: Use parameterized commands or validate input strictly

rules.name: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm - MD5
rules.description: MD5 is cryptographically broken
rules.fix: Use SHA-256 or stronger algorithms

rules.name: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm - SHA1
rules.description: SHA1 is cryptographically weak
rules.fix: Use SHA-256 or stronger algorithms

rules.name: Insecure Random Number Generation
rules.description: Math.random() is not cryptographically secure
rules.fix: Use crypto.randomBytes() or crypto.getRandomValues()

rules.name: Path Traversal Risk
rules.description: Potential path traversal vulnerability
rules.fix: Validate and sanitize file paths, use path.resolve()

rules.name: Insecure HTTP Usage
rules.description: HTTP used instead of HTTPS
rules.fix: Use HTTPS for all external communications

rules.name: Disabled SSL/TLS Verification
rules.description: SSL/TLS certificate verification disabled
rules.fix: Never disable SSL/TLS verification in production

rules.name: Unsafe Deserialization
rules.description: Unsafe deserialization can lead to RCE
rules.owasp: A08:2021 - Software and Data Integrity Failures
rules.fix: Use safe deserialization methods or validate input

rules.name: Debug Mode Enabled
rules.description: Debug mode should not be enabled in production
rules.fix: Disable debug mode in production environments

rules.name: Missing Authentication Check
rules.description: Route/endpoint without authentication check
rules.fix: Add authentication middleware or decorators

rules.name: Weak Password Requirements
rules.description: Weak password validation detected
rules.fix: Enforce strong password requirements (min 8 chars, complexity)

rules.name: Token Storage in localStorage
rules.description: Storing authentication tokens in localStorage is vulnerable to XSS attacks
rules.fix: Use httpOnly cookies for token storage, or sessionStorage with short-lived tokens

rules.name: Sensitive Data in sessionStorage
rules.description: Storing sensitive data in sessionStorage - ensure tokens are short-lived and validated server-side
rules.fix: Prefer httpOnly cookies. If using sessionStorage, ensure tokens are short-lived and validated server-side

rules.name: Exposed AWS Credentials
rules.description: AWS credentials detected in source code
rules.fix: Use IAM roles, environment variables, or AWS Secrets Manager

rules.name: Private Key in Code
rules.description: Private key detected in source code
rules.fix: Store private keys in secure key management systems, never in code

rules.name: JWT Secret Hardcoded
rules.description: JWT secret appears to be hardcoded
rules.fix: Store JWT secrets in environment variables or secret management systems

rules.name: CORS Allow All Origins
rules.description: CORS configured to allow all origins (*)
rules.fix: Restrict CORS to specific trusted origins

rules.name: Sensitive Data in URL
rules.description: Sensitive data passed in URL query parameters
rules.fix: Pass sensitive data in request body or headers, not URL parameters

rules.name: Console Log Sensitive Data
rules.description: Potentially logging sensitive data to console
rules.owasp: A09:2021 - Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
rules.fix: Remove sensitive data from console logs, especially in production

rules.name: Prototype Pollution Risk
rules.description: Object property assignment that could lead to prototype pollution
rules.fix: Validate and sanitize object keys, use Object.create(null) for dictionaries

rules.name: Open Redirect Vulnerability
rules.description: Potential open redirect vulnerability
rules.fix: Validate redirect URLs against a whitelist of allowed destinations

rules.name: Hardcoded Database Connection String
rules.description: Database connection string with credentials hardcoded
rules.fix: Store database credentials in environment variables or secret management

rules.name: XSS - document.write
rules.description: document.write can lead to XSS vulnerabilities
rules.fix: Use DOM manipulation methods like createElement and appendChild instead

rules.name: Insecure Cookie Settings
rules.description: Cookie missing secure or httpOnly flags
rules.fix: Set Secure, HttpOnly, and SameSite flags on sensitive cookies

rules.name: NoSQL Injection Risk
rules.description: Potential NoSQL injection vulnerability
rules.fix: Sanitize user input and avoid using $where operator with user data

rules.name: Exposed GraphQL Introspection
rules.description: GraphQL introspection should be disabled in production
rules.fix: Disable GraphQL introspection in production environments

rules.name: Exposed Stack Trace in Error Handler
rules.description: Error handler exposes stack trace to client
rules.fix: Log stack traces server-side only, return generic error messages to clients

rules.name: Missing CSRF Token in Form
rules.description: Form submission without CSRF token protection
rules.fix: Include CSRF token in all state-changing forms

rules.name: Fetch/Axios Without Error Handling
rules.description: HTTP request without proper error handling may leak sensitive info
rules.owasp: A09:2021 - Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
rules.fix: Always handle errors from HTTP requests to prevent information leakage

rules.name: Unvalidated Redirect URL
rules.description: Redirect using user-controlled URL without validation
rules.fix: Validate redirect URLs against allowlist before redirecting

rules.name: Stripe Secret Key Exposed
rules.description: Stripe secret key detected in source code
rules.fix: Store Stripe keys in environment variables, never in source code

rules.name: GitHub Token Exposed
rules.description: GitHub personal access token detected
rules.fix: Use GitHub Apps or environment variables for authentication

rules.name: Slack Token Exposed
rules.description: Slack bot or user token detected
rules.fix: Store Slack tokens in environment variables or secret management

rules.name: Google API Key Exposed
rules.description: Google API key detected in source code
rules.fix: Restrict API key usage and store in environment variables

rules.name: Firebase Config Exposed
rules.description: Firebase configuration with sensitive data exposed
rules.fix: Use environment variables and restrict Firebase security rules

rules.name: Twilio Credentials Exposed
rules.description: Twilio account SID or auth token detected
rules.fix: Store Twilio credentials in environment variables

rules.name: SendGrid API Key Exposed
rules.description: SendGrid API key detected in source code
rules.fix: Store SendGrid API keys in environment variables

rules.name: Mailchimp API Key Exposed
rules.description: Mailchimp API key detected in source code
rules.fix: Store Mailchimp API keys in environment variables

rules.name: Unsafe Object Spread from User Input
rules.description: Spreading user input into objects can lead to prototype pollution or mass assignment
rules.fix: Explicitly pick allowed properties instead of spreading user input

rules.name: Regex DoS (ReDoS) Risk
rules.description: Complex regex pattern that may be vulnerable to ReDoS attacks
rules.fix: Validate and sanitize user input before using in regex, use timeout for regex execution

rules.name: Unsafe File Upload
rules.description: File upload without proper validation
rules.fix: Validate file type, size, and content; store outside webroot

rules.name: Helmet.js Not Configured
rules.description: Express app without Helmet.js security headers
rules.fix: Use Helmet.js to set security headers (CSP, X-Frame-Options, etc.)

rules.name: Rate Limiting Not Implemented
rules.description: API endpoint without rate limiting
rules.fix: Implement rate limiting on authentication and sensitive endpoints

rules.name: Timing Attack Vulnerability
rules.description: String comparison vulnerable to timing attacks
rules.fix: Use constant-time comparison (crypto.timingSafeEqual) for secrets

rules.name: Insecure JWT Verification
rules.description: JWT verification without algorithm specification allows algorithm confusion attacks
rules.fix: Always specify allowed algorithms in JWT verification options

rules.name: Bcrypt Low Cost Factor
rules.description: Bcrypt with low cost factor (< 10) is vulnerable to brute force
rules.fix: Use bcrypt cost factor of at least 10 (12+ recommended)

rules.name: Supabase Anon Key in Client Code
rules.description: Supabase anon key exposed - ensure RLS policies are properly configured
rules.fix: Ensure Row Level Security (RLS) policies are enabled and properly configured

rules.name: Prisma Raw Query Injection
rules.description: Prisma raw query with string interpolation is vulnerable to SQL injection
rules.fix: Use Prisma.sql tagged template or parameterized queries

rules.name: Next.js API Route Without Auth
rules.description: Next.js API route without authentication check
rules.fix: Add authentication middleware or session check to API routes

rules.name: Exposed Error Details in Production
rules.description: Detailed error information exposed that should be hidden in production
rules.fix: Return generic error messages in production, log details server-side

rules.name: Unsafe Dynamic Import
rules.description: Dynamic import with user-controlled path can lead to code injection
rules.fix: Validate and whitelist allowed module paths before dynamic import
